mapper.select: SELECT n.*, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, n.create_date, NOW()) < 1 THEN '방금 전' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, n.create_date, NOW()) < 60 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, n.create_date, NOW()), '분 전') WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, n.create_date, NOW()) < 24 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, n.create_date, NOW()), '시간 전') WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, n.create_date, NOW()) = 1 THEN '어제' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(n.create_date, '%m/%d') END AS create_date_label FROM notification n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.create_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
